groundstation.config.spectrumconfig.Band.Description: The bandwidth of the spectrum. AWS Ground Station currently has the following bandwidth limitations:   + For `AntennaDownlinkDemodDecodeconfig`, valid values are between 125 kHz to 650 MHz.+ For `AntennaDownlinkconfig`, valid values are between 10 kHz to 54 MHz.+ For `AntennaUplinkConfig`, valid values are between 10 kHz to 54 MHz.

groundstation.config.spectrumconfig.Cent.Description: The center frequency of the spectrum. Valid values are between 2200 to 2300 MHz and 7750 to 8400 MHz for downlink and 2025 to 2120 MHz for uplink.

groundstation.config.spectrumconfig.Pola.Description: The polarization of the spectrum. Valid values are `"RIGHT_HAND"` and `"LEFT_HAND"`. Capturing both `"RIGHT_HAND"` and `"LEFT_HAND"` polarization requires two separate configs.
